interface.longDescription: Use when planning, diagnosing, or redesigning product UI and UX flows, especially "this UI sucks" broken-component requests. Grounds recommendations in user stories, current UI diagnosis, comparable/latest examples, states, and a clear implementation handoff before visual-design or frontend-craft builds.
